title: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing and Multiple Filters

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing and Multiple Filters

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>\n  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#f7f7f7'/>
  <rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='220' rx='10' fill='#E5E5EA' opacity='0.5'/>
  <rect x='50' y='50' width='300' height='180' rx='10' fill='#D3D3D3' opacity='0.3'/>
  <circle cx='200' cy='150' r='80' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='60' y='120' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>Filters</text>
  <text x='60' y='170' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>Products</text>
  <path d='M 100 220 L 280 220 L 280 280 L 100 280 Z' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <g fill='#411C56'>
    <text x='200' y='220' font-size='18'>Category</text>
    <text x='200' y='240' font-size='18'>Price Range</text>
    <text x='200' y='260' font-size='18'>Rating</text>
  </g>
  <rect x='60' y='220' width='160' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='230' y='220' width='140' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='300' y='220' width='140' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing and Multiple Filters

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filter logic, product list rendering, and real-time pricing updates.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, efficient state use, and modular component design.
